name: Double Fin Shark
name_jp: ダブルフィン・シャーク
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 3 or 4 WATER Fish monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You cannot Special Summon any monsters during the turn you activate this effect, except WATER monsters.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 3 or 4 WATER Fish monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You cannot Special Summon any monsters during the turn you activate this effect, except WATER monsters.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Level 3 or 4 WATER Fish monster in your GY; Special Summon that target in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You cannot Special Summon any monsters during the turn you activate this effect, except WATER monsters.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
